markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss the current state and future of the partnership between GrowthX and Firework.](https://fathom.video/share/K1mCs41dy-EngTMTSqZyv7U6Ey-HY6Pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has evolved significantly since Firework became a customer, shifting focus to content strategy, production, and LLM optimization](https://fathom.video/share/K1mCs41dy-EngTMTSqZyv7U6Ey-HY6Pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1078.0)
  - [Firework's needs have changed, now prioritizing enterprise customers and depth over reach](https://fathom.video/share/K1mCs41dy-EngTMTSqZyv7U6Ey-HY6Pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
  - [Both parties agree the partnership is no longer aligned with their current strategies](https://fathom.video/share/K1mCs41dy-EngTMTSqZyv7U6Ey-HY6Pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [A mutual decision was made to end the partnership amicably](https://fathom.video/share/K1mCs41dy-EngTMTSqZyv7U6Ey-HY6Pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)

## Topics

### Company Updates and Introductions

  - [Firework: 250 employees globally, serving 5 regions with significant revenue](https://fathom.video/share/K1mCs41dy-EngTMTSqZyv7U6Ey-HY6Pb?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
  - [Abhishek joined Firework as CMO in March 2023 after advising since early 2022](https://fathom.video/share/K1mCs41dy-EngTMTSqZyv7U6Ey-HY6Pb?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
  - [Marcel founded GrowthX, now at 70+ employees, 50+ customers, approaching $15M revenue](https://fathom.video/share/K1mCs41dy-EngTMTSqZyv7U6Ey-HY6Pb?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)

### GrowthX Platform Overview

  - [Custom knowledge bases and artifacts for context-aware content creation](https://fathom.video/share/K1mCs41dy-EngTMTSqZyv7U6Ey-HY6Pb?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
  - [AI-driven workflow engine for research, drafting, fact-checking, and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/K1mCs41dy-EngTMTSqZyv7U6Ey-HY6Pb?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Tailored image generation and brand-specific content production](https://fathom.video/share/K1mCs41dy-EngTMTSqZyv7U6Ey-HY6Pb?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Focus on content strategy, execution, LLM optimization, and visibility tracking](https://fathom.video/share/K1mCs41dy-EngTMTSqZyv7U6Ey-HY6Pb?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)

### Partnership Misalignment

  - [Firework's needs have shifted away from content generation and reach](https://fathom.video/share/K1mCs41dy-EngTMTSqZyv7U6Ey-HY6Pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
  - [Current focus on targeting enterprise customers and depth over breadth](https://fathom.video/share/K1mCs41dy-EngTMTSqZyv7U6Ey-HY6Pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
  - [Content is no longer a primary driver for Firework's strategy](https://fathom.video/share/K1mCs41dy-EngTMTSqZyv7U6Ey-HY6Pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [3 out of 4 original partnership aspects are no longer relevant](https://fathom.video/share/K1mCs41dy-EngTMTSqZyv7U6Ey-HY6Pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)

### Decision to End Partnership

  - [Mutual agreement to not renew the contract](https://fathom.video/share/K1mCs41dy-EngTMTSqZyv7U6Ey-HY6Pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
  - [Firework is currently GrowthX's lowest-paying customer](https://fathom.video/share/K1mCs41dy-EngTMTSqZyv7U6Ey-HY6Pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
  - [Both parties acknowledge the divergence in strategies and priorities](https://fathom.video/share/K1mCs41dy-EngTMTSqZyv7U6Ey-HY6Pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to check for any outstanding invoices](https://fathom.video/share/K1mCs41dy-EngTMTSqZyv7U6Ey-HY6Pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)
  - [Marcel to send a formal email to Abhishek outlining the agreement to end the partnership](https://fathom.video/share/K1mCs41dy-EngTMTSqZyv7U6Ey-HY6Pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)
  - [Coordinate timing for informing respective teams about the partnership conclusion](https://fathom.video/share/K1mCs41dy-EngTMTSqZyv7U6Ey-HY6Pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)
  - [Determine a smooth transition period (1-2 weeks) to formally end the engagement](https://fathom.video/share/K1mCs41dy-EngTMTSqZyv7U6Ey-HY6Pb?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)
